BackstoryDef.title: Internet content creator
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: In [PAWN_possessive] early adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] would upload videos endorsing gambling and promoting many shady websites. [PAWN_nameDef] grew a following known for being toxic, and constantly abused [PAWN_possessive] audience to get [PAWN_possessive] way, or attack anyone who spoke poorly of them. Eventually all of [PAWN_nameDef]'s accounts were deleted and banned, leading to [PAWN_objective] leaving the red-tinted limelight for good.
